description_long: This is a female adult figure with a medium build, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. She is wearing a sleeveless, knee-length dress with a bold animal print pattern and a wide belt cinched at the waist. Her footwear consists of pointed-toe heels with ankle straps, giving her a formal yet stylish appearance. The figure has voluminous, short, curly hair that frames her face and extends outward. Her facial features are expressive, with a focused gaze and defined eyebrows. The overall look suggests a confident urban pedestrian, possibly on her way to a social or professional event.
description: A standing adult woman in a sleeveless animal print dress, wide belt, pointed heels, and short curly hair, exuding a confident urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full dress, belt, facial features, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the dress's fit, and the shape of the heels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the dress, belt, and the volume of the hair.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the arm, side of the dress, and the heel profile.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless knee-length dress with a wide belt
